notes_for_next_session: For 10:15 AM entry agent: Watchlist is EMPTY (0 candidates) — DO NOT attempt entries, there is nothing to trade. CRITICAL STRUCTURAL ISSUE (confirmed across multiple sessions including a mid-session re-run on 2026-05-29 at ~12:38 PM ET that also returned 0): premarket_scan.py computes rel_vol as today cumulative daily-bar volume / prior full-day volume. Pre-open this is ~0 (rejects everything), and even mid-session the gate almost never clears when combined with gap-up >=2%. Re-running does NOT fix this — a code maintenance fix is required: switch to minute-bar rel_vol vs a time-of-day baseline, or relax the rel_vol and gap-up thresholds, or source pre-market snapshot data.
